what_works: Homepage title and meta description now target مشاوره رایگان کنکور, ذهن آتی, دکتر زهرا جعفری, اصفهان, تهران, and online consultation.
Homepage has one visible H1: مشاوره رایگان کنکور در ذهن آتی.
Homepage includes conversion and proof paths through consultation request links, contact page links, report-card/interview, satisfaction, webinar, voice content, branch mentions, and a lead form.
/about/ returns 200, has one H1, mentions دکتر زهرا جعفری, and includes proof claims such as ۲۰۰۰+ قبولی and ۵۰۰ رتبه دو و سه‌رقمی.
/contact-us/ returns 200 with contact-focused title/meta, phone number, Isfahan/Tehran branch mentions, and online consultation language.
/مشاوره-کنکور/ returns 200 with relevant title and meta description, giving the site a main hub URL to rebuild.

findings.title: E-E-A-T is undermined by fish-programmer author signals
findings.description: The homepage still exposes fish-programmer in author-related metadata, and live probes found fish-programmer present on homepage, /مشاوره-کنکور/, /about/, /contact-us/, and redirected legacy pages. This conflicts with the public expert identity of دکتر زهرا جعفری and weakens trust, social previews, and AI/entity interpretation.
findings.recommendation: Replace every fish-programmer author, byline, schema, and social-card signal with دکتر زهرا جعفری or a verified آکادمی ذهن آتی organization author. Add a real Person entity for Dr. Jafari with credentials, role, image, sameAs, worksFor, and a link to /about/.

findings.title: Homepage is still thin as a commercial service explanation
findings.description: The homepage now has correct title, meta, H1, branch mentions, proof links, and CTA elements, but the visible service narrative remains light. It does not clearly explain the counseling method, student fit, parent/student pain points, free-session details, ongoing follow-up, Dr. Jafari credibility, pricing expectations, or FAQ objections.
findings.recommendation: Add 700-1000 words of concise homepage copy covering a short intro, حضوری/آنلاین services, Dr. Jafari bio, method/process, branch details, proof with context, FAQ, and internal links to core service/local landings.

findings.title: P0 service and local landings are missing or mismatched
findings.description: Live probes show /مشاوره-آنلاین-کنکور/, /اصفهان/, /تهران/, /بهترین-مشاور-کنکور-اصفهان/, /بهترین-مشاور-کنکور-تهران/, and /قیمت-مشاوره-کنکور/ return 404. /ثبت-نام/, /برنامه-ریزی-کنکور/, and /انتخاب-رشته/ redirect to mismatched legacy articles instead of commercial landing pages.
findings.recommendation: Create or repair P0 pages for مشاوره کنکور, مشاوره آنلاین, قیمت, ثبت نام, برنامه ریزی, انتخاب رشته, اصفهان, تهران, and city-specific best-consultant intent. Each page should have one intent, one H1, 700-1200 words, proof, FAQ, CTA, schema, and internal links.

findings.title: /مشاوره-کنکور/ is live but not quality-ready
findings.description: /مشاوره-کنکور/ returns 200 with relevant title/meta, but the live page has 17 H1 elements and includes unrelated article/widget titles. The probe did not find دکتر زهرا جعفری on the page, which is a serious weakness for the site's main consultation hub.
findings.recommendation: Rebuild /مشاوره-کنکور/ as the canonical consultation hub with exactly one H1, Dr. Jafari authority, counseling method, رشته‌های تجربی/ریاضی/انسانی coverage, online/in-person options, proof, pricing/registration path, FAQ, and links to child pages.

findings.title: About and contact trust pages need stronger citation blocks
findings.description: /about/ is live, has one H1, and mentions دکتر زهرا جعفری. /contact-us/ is live and has strong contact meta, but the live text does not mention Dr. Jafari. Both pages still need more structured trust content around credentials, branch NAP, hours, service area, process, and proof sources.
findings.recommendation: Make /about/ the canonical founder and academy trust page. Expand /contact-us/ with separate Isfahan and Tehran branch blocks, consistent phone/address/hours, map links, expected response time, and what happens after submitting the form.

findings.title: AI citation readiness is low
findings.description: The site has useful brand signals, but AI-readable facts are fragmented by wrong author identity, weak Person entity coverage, missing city/service pages, no visible homepage FAQ, inconsistent local branch depth, and a main service hub polluted by unrelated H1s.
findings.recommendation: Add citation-ready blocks for About ذهن آتی, Who is دکتر زهرا جعفری, Services, Branches, How consultation works, Results, Pricing/registration, and FAQ. Mirror those visible facts in Person, LocalBusiness, Service, and FAQPage schema where appropriate.
